summary:
Nightly consolidation complete. MEMORY.md is at 104 lines (limit: 200).

**Added:**
- "Claude (LLM) Setup" section — Sonnet 4.6, Max plan, OAuth (was missing)
- "Alfie Project Status" section — concise 3-line summary replacing the verbose GR00T block; includes mic fix and OAK-D removal from 2026-02-24 notes
- "Lloyd Project Status" section — nightly cron, Android app status, Orpheus TTS evaluation finding, YouTube transcript skill
- `youtube-transcript.md` added to the skills list

**Pruned / condensed:**
- Removed duplicate "Project vs. Personal Directories" section (it appeared twice)
- GR00T fine-tuning block trimmed from 6 lines of specs to a 3-line project summary (full detail lives in `projects/alfie/gr00t/phase2-summary.md`)
- QMD section condensed — dropped verbose config params, kept the watch item and key facts
- "Claude Code Usage" standalone section removed; its content merged into the existing sub-agent directive section (it was redundant)

**No moves to external files needed** — project-specific details (GR00T, Alfie backlog) were already captured in project docs by prior sessions. MEMORY.md now just references them.
